steps.title: Eliminate one variable
steps.content:
Set the two expressions for $y$ equal to each other.
$$-12x+16=-20x+24$$
$$8x=8$$
$$x=1$$

steps.title: Find the ordered pair
steps.content:
Substitute the value of $x$ into either equation.
$$y=-12(1)+16=4$$
The solution is $(1,4)$, which matches the listed ordered pair. The answer is A.
